title: Ability to show/hide subitems in sharable view
excerpt:
I’d love the ability to decide if I want my public / shareable view should show or hide subitems. 
I’ve run into an issue between subitems and shareable / public views. I can set my board subitems and columns and save to…

posts.author: jbigos (Jen Bigos)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love the ability to decide if I want my public / shareable view should show or hide subitems.

I’ve run into an issue between subitems and shareable / public views. I can set my board subitems and columns and save to view, but when I go to publish that view, all the subitem columns automatically pull through the shared view, even if I hid them on the board.
I’m told this is not a bug, but clearly the public / shared view html is not doing what the board view is doing, so it has to be a bug - doesn’t it? Please fix, it’s infuriating!

posts.author: Hanael (Hanael)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 Clickup’s features on this point are very good. One is able to choose what is shared using the link (sub-items, updates, etc.) => I would love to have this in Monday.
